title: Universal Dynamical Response to Slow Driving in Chaotic Systems
comment: 17 pages and 6 figures, including Supplemental Material
summary: We propose a unified perspective on classical and quantum chaos based on the stability of a system's stationary states under slow driving. We probe this sensitivity via the system's susceptibility to the average protocol speed, which we call the ``speed-Fisher information," and relate it to irreversible entropy production in the system. We show that chaotic dynamics manifests as a divergence of the speed-Fisher information with the protocol time, and that this response is controlled by the perturbation's low-frequency spectral weight. This approach to chaos applies to both classical and quantum Hamiltonian systems, and naturally extends to non-Hamiltonian classical flows. We illustrate this framework with simple classical and quantum examples, along with a non-Hamiltonian flow that qualitatively exhibits analogous low-frequency spectral behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一视角来看待经典与量子混沌，基于系统稳态在慢驱动下的稳定性，通过“速度-费舍尔信息”作为敏感度指标，并发现混沌动力学表现为该信息随协议时间发散，且该响应受扰动低频谱权重控制。该框架适用于经典和量子哈密顿系统，并可推广到非哈密顿经典流。
AI.motivation: 现有经典与量子混沌理论缺乏统一的描述框架，传统指标（如李雅普诺夫指数）在量子系统中难以直接应用。作者希望从信息论角度建立一种普适的混沌诊断方法。
AI.method: 引入“速度-费舍尔信息”（speed-Fisher information）作为稳态对慢驱动速度的敏感度度量，将其与不可逆熵产生关联，并分析其低频谱行为。框架适用于经典/量子哈密顿系统及非哈密顿经典流，通过简单例子进行验证。
AI.result: 混沌动力学表现为速度-费舍尔信息随协议时间发散，该发散由扰动的低频谱权重控制；经典与量子案例均验证了这一行为，非哈密顿流也表现出类似的低频谱特征。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一种统一的混沌理论视角，有望弥合经典与量子混沌之间的鸿沟，并为非哈密顿系统的混沌研究开辟新途径。

title: Pareto-optimal control strategies in intrinsically nonequilibrium systems
summary: Thermodynamic control is typically formulated as the optimisation of a single objective, yet competing costs rarely admit a common optimum, so single-objective control captures only one corner of the achievable performance space. We develop a general framework for multi-objective thermodynamic control of intrinsically nonequilibrium systems that maps out the full Pareto front of optimal control strategies. We show that Pareto-optimal protocols generically consist of smooth branches connected by boundary jumps, and that the relative weights of the objectives combine with the physical parameters into a single intrinsic scale that alone governs the trade-off. Remarkably, this scale plays a double role: it parametrizes a single functional form that generates the entire front, and it defines control equivalence classes, in which systems with different parameters but the same scale share identical optimal strategies. We illustrate the framework for two paradigmatic systems that are experimentally accessible: transport of an active particle in a harmonic trap, and a cyclic quantum-dot engine. For both, we obtain the Pareto front and optimal strategies in closed form.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了多目标热力学控制的通用框架，能够绘制帕累托最优前沿，发现最优协议由平滑分支和边界跳跃组成，并揭示了一个内在尺度参数同时控制权衡和定义控制等价类。
AI.motivation: 传统热力学控制只优化单一目标，但现实中的竞争性成本很少存在共同最优解，因此需要多目标框架来捕捉完整的性能空间。
AI.method: 建立多目标热力学控制的一般框架，通过帕累托前沿分析映射最优控制策略，并利用内在尺度参数来参数化整个前沿。
AI.result: 帕累托最优协议由平滑分支和边界跳跃组成；相对权重与物理参数结合成一个内在尺度，该尺度同时参数化整个前沿并定义控制等价类。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在活性粒子输运和量子点引擎两个实验可及系统中得到了闭合形式验证，证明了方法的普适性和实用性。

title: Two-Dimensional Phase Transitions in Classical Systems: 60 Years after the Hohenberg-Mermin-Wagner Theorem
comment: This version has been accepted by Chinese Physics B as an invited review paper
summary: In 1966, Hohenberg, Mermin and Wagner proved that long-wavelength fluctuations destabilize the long-range order of continuous symmetry in two-dimensional (2D) systems. Later in the 1970s, Berezinskii, Kosterlitz and Thouless developed the BKT theory describing an unconventional phase transition between quasi-long-range and short-range order in 2D systems driven by the binding-unbinding of topological defects, which has become a fundamental topic in statistical mechanics, condensed matter physics, and soft matter physics. One of the most important applications of the BKT theory is the melting of 2D crystals, whose mechanisms are not yet fully understood. Recently, this topic has been extended to the area of active matter, where the non-equilibrium nature leads to novel phenomena that deviate from the Hohenberg-Mermin-Wagner theorem. In this review, we first focus on the recent theoretical and computational progress in the 2D melting problem in passive systems, and then summarize the inspiring results obtained from non-equilibrium systems. The review closes with comments on several promising directions for predicting 2D melting scenarios and for understanding the non-equilibrium nature in 2D active matter systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了二维系统熔化问题的最新理论与计算进展，包括被动系统中的BKT理论应用与主动非平衡系统中的新兴现象，并展望了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 自1966年Hohenberg-Mermin-Wagner定理指出二维系统无连续对称性长程序，到1970年代BKT理论揭示拓扑缺陷驱动的准长程序-短程序相变，二维熔化机制至今未完全理解。近年来主动物质领域非平衡现象进一步挑战传统理论，亟需系统性综述。
AI.method: 采用综述性方法，梳理被动系统中二维熔化的理论与计算进展（如BKT理论的应用），再总结非平衡系统（主动物质）中偏离HMW定理的新结果。
AI.result: 系统呈现了被动二维熔化理论的发展脉络，并指出主动非平衡系统中出现的偏离传统定理的新奇现象。
AI.conclusion: 强调了预测二维熔化场景和理解非平衡性质的两个未来方向，为后续研究提供了指导。

title: Evaluating the solution performance of the augmented Lagrangian function on Ising machines
summary: We apply the augmented Lagrangian function (ALF) as a formulation for Ising machines and evaluate its performance by time-to-epsilon (\mathrm{TT\varepsilon}). The ALF has been well studied in continuous optimization for its numerical stability and convergence, and its advantage over the penalty function formulation is demonstrated here through the following results. Using the quadratic knapsack problem as a benchmark, we examine the dependence of \mathrm{TT\varepsilon} on the hyperparameters μand λ. The augmented Lagrangian formulation reduces \mathrm{TT\varepsilon} by roughly an order of magnitude compared with the penalty function formulation, keeping μsmall while obtaining feasible solutions and, for representative parameter settings, reaching high-precision solutions earlier in the search. These findings indicate that the augmented Lagrangian function is a promising formulation for improving the solution performance of Ising machines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将增广拉格朗日函数（ALF）作为Ising机的目标函数形式，以二次背包问题为基准，通过时间-精度（TTε）指标进行评估。实验表明，相比传统罚函数形式，ALF能将TTε降低约一个数量级，在保持小μ的同时获得可行解，并更早达到高精度解，证明ALF是提升Ising机求解性能的有效形式。
AI.motivation: 增广拉格朗日函数在连续优化中已有良好的数值稳定性和收敛性证明，但其在Ising机（离散优化硬件）上的应用尚未被充分探索。作者希望将这一优势迁移到Ising机中，以改善其求解性能。
AI.method: 采用增广拉格朗日函数替代传统罚函数作为Ising机的目标函数形式；以二次背包问题（quadratic knapsack problem）为基准测试；使用时间-精度（TTε）作为评估指标，系统考察超参数μ和λ对性能的影响。
AI.result: 相比罚函数形式，增广拉格朗日函数将TTε降低约一个数量级；可在保持μ较小的情况下获得可行解；在代表性参数设置下，能更早地搜索到高精度解。
AI.conclusion: 增广拉格朗日函数是提升Ising机求解性能的一种有前景的目标函数形式，值得进一步研究和应用。

title: Probing the pairing symmetry of moiré graphene superconductors
summary: The pairing symmetry of magic-angle moiré graphene is a fundamental question that remains unresolved. Combining experimental and theoretical inputs, we constrain the superconducting order parameters that can emerge from the incommensurate Kekulé spiral (IKS) normal state on the hole-doped side of $ν= -2$. Imposing the additional experimental constraint of nodal superconductivity, we are left with the task of distinguishing between singlet or triplet pairing, and of determining the d-vector in the latter case. We propose definitive tests to identify the pairing symmetry based on two classes of experiments using the response of the superconducting state to Zeeman field orientation. The first set of predictions is for spectroscopic and thermodynamic measurements sensitive to low-energy excitations near the nodes. The second set is for phase-sensitive measurements of topologically protected Andreev bound states near boundaries, whose spectroscopy is shown to provide a smoking gun signature of the pairing symmetry.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验与理论结合，约束了魔角莫尔石墨烯在空穴掺杂侧ν=-2附近从IKS常态衍生的超导序参量，并提出了通过Zeeman场方向响应实验来区分自旋单态/三重态配对及确定d矢量的决定性测试方案。
AI.motivation: 魔角莫尔石墨烯的配对对称性是一个尚未解决的基础性问题，本文旨在通过实验约束并结合理论分析，明确其超导配对对称性。
AI.method: 结合实验与理论输入，从IKS常态出发约束超导序参量，利用节点超导的实验约束，区分单态与三重态配对；基于超导态对Zeeman场方向的响应，设计了两类实验测试：一是针对节点附近低能激发的谱学与热力学测量，二是针对边界拓扑保护Andreev束缚态的相敏测量。
AI.result: 提出了两类决定性实验测试：第一类针对节点附近低能激发的谱学与热力学测量；第二类针对边界拓扑保护Andreev束缚态的相敏测量，其谱学可作为配对对称性的"确凿证据"。
AI.conclusion: 通过Zeeman场方向响应实验，可以明确区分魔角莫尔石墨烯的超导配对对称性（单态/三重态及d矢量方向），其中边界Andreev束缚态谱学是配对对称性的决定性判据。

title: Fermi surface change and $d$-wave superconductivity in the square lattice Kondo-Heisenberg model
summary: We study the two-dimensional Kondo-Heisenberg model on a square lattice, with the conduction electrons away from half-filling, using neural network quantum states. Mapping the ground-state phase diagram as a function of the Kondo and Heisenberg couplings, we identify (i) at weak Kondo coupling, antiferromagnetic Néel order with a Fermi surface whose enclosed area counts only the conduction electrons and is insensitive to the Néel order, and (ii) at strong coupling, a heavy Fermi liquid with a Fermi surface whose enclosed area counts both the conduction electrons and the spins. In the crossover between these regimes, we find $d_{x^2-y^2}$ superconductivity, evidenced by off-diagonal long-range order in the pair-pair correlations and a pairing-amplitude dome that coexists with the underlying magnetic phase. Our results establish Fermi volume change and unconventional superconductivity as intrinsic features of the two-dimensional Kondo-Heisenberg model.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用神经网络量子态方法求解二维Kondo-Heisenberg模型，发现弱Kondo耦合下为反铁磁Néel序（费米面仅计及传导电子），强耦合下为重费米液体（费米面同时计及传导电子和自旋），中间区域存在d波超导配对，证明了费米体积变化和非常规超导是模型的内在特征。
AI.motivation: 探究二维Kondo-Heisenberg模型在传导电子非半满填充情况下的基态相图，特别是理解费米体积变化和非常规超导的微观机制。
AI.method: 采用神经网络量子态作为变分波函数，对方格点上的二维Kondo-Heisenberg模型进行数值求解，通过调节Kondo耦合和Heisenberg耦合强度映射基态相图。
AI.result: (1)弱Kondo耦合区：反铁磁Néel序，费米面仅包含传导电子，面积对Néel序不敏感；(2)强耦合区：重费米液体，费米面同时包含传导电子和自旋；(3)中间交叉区：d_{x^2-y^2}波超导，表现为配对-配对关联中的非对角长程序和配对振幅穹顶，且与磁序共存。
AI.conclusion: 费米体积变化和非常规超导是二维Kondo-Heisenberg模型的内在特征，为理解重费米子体系中的量子相变和超导机制提供了重要数值证据。

title: Field-like Perturbation Enabled Six-state Readout in Triaxial $α$-$\mathrm{Fe}_{2}\mathrm{O}_{3}$|Pt Bi-layers
comment: main article: 7 pages, 5 figurers and Supplemental material: 5 pages and 4 figures
summary: Understanding current-induced spin-orbit torques provides a route for all-electrical control of antiferromagnetic (AFM) order. Here, we demonstrate the reading of six-state memory stabilized by easy-plane triaxial anisotropy in canted antiferromagnetic $α$-$\mathrm{Fe}_{2}\mathrm{O}_{3}$|Pt bilayers. The conventional spin Hall magnetoresistance (SMR) readout cannot distinguish states separated by $180^\circ$, limiting detection to only three states in $α$-$\mathrm{Fe}_{2}\mathrm{O}_{3}$. We show that a static field-like perturbation via external field lifts the degeneracy of opposite states in $α$-$\mathrm{Fe}_{2}\mathrm{O}_{3}$, enabling unambiguous resolution of all six states in the first-harmonic SMR signal. Our analytical and numerical modeling elucidate the role of spontaneous canting in lifting such degeneracy in $α$-$\mathrm{Fe}_{2}\mathrm{O}_{3}$. We demonstrate that dual-modulation SMR measurements (simultaneous current and field excitations) are effective in mitigating thermal drifts in the signals and are essential for reliable readout. Furthermore, our computations of the second-harmonic SMR reveal the interplay of competing interactions governing the decisive lifting of the degeneracy of opposite states. Finally, we propose a two-step current-only protocol for six-state readout in canted AFM $α$-$\mathrm{Fe}_{2}\mathrm{O}_{3}$|Pt bilayers.

AI.tldr: 本文在α-Fe₂O₃|Pt双层膜中实现了六态存储的读取，利用静态类场微扰打破自旋霍尔磁电阻（SMR）中180°简并，并通过双调制SMR测量抑制热漂移，最终提出了一种纯电流驱动的六态读取协议。
AI.motivation: 传统SMR读出示无法区分反铁磁中180°相反的磁态，从而限制了多态存储的检测能力。本文旨在通过外在或内在手段打破这种简并，实现更高密度的存储读取。
AI.method: 在易平面三轴各向异性的倾斜反铁磁α-Fe₂O₃|Pt体系中，施加静态类场微扰（外场或自发倾斜），结合一阶和二阶谐波SMR分析，以及双调制SMR测量（同时激发电流和场），并辅以解析和数值建模。
AI.result: 成功区分了所有六个磁态，消除了180°简并；揭示了自发倾斜在打破简并中的关键作用；双调制SMR有效抑制了热漂移；二阶谐波SMR揭示了竞争相互作用的机制。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个两步纯电流协议，用于在倾斜反铁磁α-Fe₂O₃|Pt双层膜中实现六态读取，为全电控反铁磁多态存储铺平了道路。

title: Computational references are not experiments: pre-registered validation of machine-learned sodium-cathode voltages
summary: Machine-learning screens for battery materials are trained and judged almost entirely against computed reference voltages, and those references carry their own systematic errors. We report a case in which this matters quantitatively: our own screening stack (a graph-network voltage screen, a prior-art triage layer, and a local PBE+U bench) fails pre-registered validation against experiment-anchored literature values. Verdict thresholds, failure modes, and the primary metric were committed before analysis. On an operator-audited set of known Na-ion cathodes (n = 6 after one documented exclusion; verdict unchanged at n = 7), the raw held-out mean absolute error was 0.67 V, the pre-registered conservative metric, the upper 95% confidence bound of the cross-validated bias-corrected error, was 1.09 V, and the residual was strongly voltage-dependent (r = -0.94), so no additive calibration is valid. On the two compounds where prediction, database reference, and experiment could all be compared, the Materials Project PBE+U reference sat about 0.54 V below measurement: the reference, not the model, dominated the error. A prior-art screen found at least 70% of the targeted Na substitution space already published. We retire the screen, bound what "verified" means for our DFT ledger, and pre-register a calibration audit of it against four benchmark Li couples.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一个基于机器学习筛选电池材料的方法在预注册验证中失败的具体案例。研究发现，计算参考电压本身的系统误差（如PBE+U方法）主导了预测误差，而非机器学习模型本身。在Na离子阴极材料测试中，预测误差高达0.67-1.09V，且残差与电压强相关，无法通过简单校准修正。作者最终终止了该筛选流程，并对DFT计算基准进行了验证审计。
AI.motivation: 揭示机器学习筛选电池材料时，依赖计算参考电压（如PBE+U）带来的系统性误差问题，并强调预注册验证的重要性。
AI.method: 采用预注册验证方法，使用图网络电压筛选、先验分类层和局部PBE+U基准组成的筛选堆栈，在已知Na离子阴极材料集上进行实验锚定文献值的验证。
AI.result: 原始留出平均绝对误差0.67V，保守度量（交叉验证偏差校正误差的95%置信上限）为1.09V，残差与电压强相关（r=-0.94），参考电压比实验测量值低约0.54V。
AI.conclusion: 计算参考的系统误差主导了预测误差而非模型本身，现有筛选流程无效，需要重新审视DFT计算基准的验证标准。

title: Charge transfer from ammonia neutralizes propylene oxide cations: Implications for the astrochemistry of chiral molecules
summary: To date only one chiral species, propylene oxide, has been observed in the interstellar medium but little is known about the chemistry that leads to a detectable abundance of this molecule in Sagittarius B2. We used a glow-discharge ion source and a room-temperature ion trap to study the neutralization reactions necessary to convert propylene oxide cation (PO$^+$) -- the assumed precursor for propylene oxide in space -- into the observed astrochemical. We found that the charge-transfer reaction between PO$^+$ and ammonia (NH$_3$) proceeds with a pressure-independent rate coefficient of $(1.39\pm0.03)\times10^{-12}$ cm$^{3}$ s$^{-1}$ to neutralize PO$^+$ and form the radical cation NH$_3$. Although this measured rate coefficient is much slower than that predicted by capture theories, the high abundance of NH$_3$ in Sagittarius B2 motivates the inclusion of this reaction in astrochemical models. We hypothesize that the low ionization energies of many chiral molecules important to origin-of-life theories means these species may exist as cations in the interstellar medium.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了氧化丙烯阳离子（PO⁺）与氨（NH₃）的中和反应，测得其速率系数为(1.39±0.03)×10⁻¹² cm³ s⁻¹，远低于捕获理论预测值，但考虑到人马座B2中NH₃的高丰度，该反应仍应纳入天体化学模型中。作者推测许多对生命起源重要的手性分子电离能较低，可能以阳离子形式存在于星际介质中。
AI.motivation: 目前星际介质中唯一观测到的手性物种是氧化丙烯，但其形成化学机制尚不明确。本研究旨在探究PO⁺（假设的氧化丙烯前体）的中和反应路径，以理解该分子在人马座B2中产生可检测丰度的化学过程。
AI.method: 使用辉光放电离子源和室温离子阱，研究PO⁺与NH₃的电荷转移反应，测量其速率系数并与捕获理论预测值进行比较。
AI.result: PO⁺与NH₃的电荷转移反应速率系数为(1.39±0.03)×10⁻¹² cm³ s⁻¹，与压力无关，但远低于捕获理论预测值。该反应使PO⁺中和并形成NH₃⁺自由基阳离子。
AI.conclusion: 尽管反应速率远低于理论预测，但因人马座B2中NH₃丰度很高，该反应仍应纳入天体化学模型。此外，许多对生命起源重要的手性分子电离能较低，可能以阳离子形式存在于星际介质中，这为未来搜索星际手性分子提供了新思路。

title: Universal Extraction of Quantum Critical Exponents and Phase Transitions via Tailored Hilbert Space
summary:
Finite-size scaling and the renormalization group form the central toolkit
  for analyzing quantum phase transitions (QPTs). In this Letter, we introduce
  a novel Hilbert-space tailoring scheme to probe quantum critical phenomena.
  Applied to the second-order QPT of the one-dimensional (1D) XY model, our method
  yields precise critical points and exponents on lattices containing merely 50
  unit cells. We further establish the universal applicability of this
  framework via investigations of the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless
  transition in the 1D XXZ chain: critical parameters are recovered
  with as few as 12 lattice sites. This technique may open an alternative,
  efficient route to universally characterize QPT across many-body lattice systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的希尔伯特空间裁剪方案，用于高效探测量子临界现象，仅需极少晶格点即可精确获取量子相变的关键点和临界指数。
AI.motivation: 现有有限尺寸标度和重整化群方法虽为分析量子相变的核心工具，但在计算成本上仍面临挑战，亟需更高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 引入一种希尔伯特空间裁剪（Hilbert-space tailoring）方案，通过针对性缩减态空间来探测量子临界现象。
AI.result: 在一维XY模型的二级量子相变中，仅用50个晶胞即得到精确临界点与指数；在一维XXZ链的BKT相变中，仅需12个格点即可恢复临界参数。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为多体晶格系统中量子相变的普适表征开辟了一条替代性的高效途径。

title: Multiple phases in K2Cr3As3: a playground for manipulating topological superconductivity
comment: Accepted for publication in Physical Review Letters (in press)
summary: Spin-triplet topological superconductors are rare but of fundamental interest as they can host Majorana bound states that can be used in fault-tolerant quantum computing. Recent efforts have been devoted to searching for spin-triplet states in U-based compounds, but these materials have a low transition temperature (Tc) and coexisting competing orders, which creates significant experimental challenges and often leads to contradictory conclusions. The Cr-based candidate K2Cr3As3 offers a promising alternative: it has a much higher Tc of 6.2 K and no magnetic order. Here we report a hallmark signature of spin-triplet superconductivity arising from the internal spin degrees of freedom via nuclear magnetic resonance measurements, and demonstrate the high tunability of the topological phases. We discovered three distinct superconducting phases and revealed the evolution of the paired-spins direction (d(k)-vector). At low magnetic fields, K2Cr3As3 evolves from a helical (Phase A) to a chiral state (Phase B) with a rotation of the d(k)-vector from in-plane to out-of-plane direction upon cooling, although both phases have point nodes in the gap. A linenodal gap is realized in the high-field Phase C, where the d(k)-vector lies in the basal plane. These findings establish K2Cr3As3 as a model spin-triplet superconductor and a promising platform for manipulating topological phases.

AI.tldr: 本文通过核磁共振测量，在K₂Cr₃As₃中发现了自旋三重态超导的标志性特征，揭示了三种不同的超导相及其d(k)-矢量的演化，确立了该材料作为模型自旋三重态超导体和调控拓扑相的平台地位。
AI.motivation: 自旋三重态拓扑超导体能容纳Majorana束缚态，对容错量子计算至关重要。但现有U基材料存在超导转变温度低、共存竞争序等问题，亟需寻找更优的候选材料体系。
AI.method: 采用核磁共振（NMR）测量技术，探测K₂Cr₃As₃在不同温度和磁场下的自旋自由度行为，分析其超导态的内部自旋结构和能隙特征。
AI.result: 发现了三种不同的超导相：低场下从螺旋态（A相，d(k)-矢量面内）演化为手性态（B相，d(k)-矢量面外），两者均具有点节点能隙；高场下的C相具有线节点能隙，d(k)-矢量位于基面内。
AI.conclusion: K₂Cr₃As₃是一个模型自旋三重态超导体，具有高转变温度（6.2 K）、无磁性竞争序、高度可调的拓扑相，为研究拓扑超导和量子计算提供了理想平台。

title: Domain-wall drift in a ferrimagnet induced by a linearly oscillating in-plane magnetic field
summary: We investigate ferrimagnetic domain-wall dynamics under linearly oscillating in-plane magnetic fields. Starting from a ferrimagnetic Lagrangian that retains the field-dependent contribution to the kinetic energy, we derive collective-coordinate equations for the domain-wall position and azimuthal angle. This formulation makes explicit the field-induced inertial terms, including Coriolis-, Euler-, and centrifugal-like contributions, and clarifies how they couple translational and azimuthal dynamics. For an oscillating in-plane field supplemented by a weak static out-of-plane bias field, we show that periodic switching of the wall angle can be rectified into a finite average domain-wall velocity. At low drive frequencies, where the wall angle follows the oscillating field, the induced drift is proportional to the drive frequency rather than the field amplitude, while above a cutoff frequency the wall angle can no longer follow the drive and the average motion is suppressed. Micromagnetic simulations confirm the analytical predictions and demonstrate that the magnitude and direction of the drift can be tuned by the net spin density. These results identify linearly oscillating fields as a mechanism for frequency-controlled domain-wall motion in ferrimagnets and highlight the role of inertial spin dynamics near magnetic compensation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在铁磁材料中，线性振荡面内磁场驱动畴壁运动的现象，发现可以通过频率而非振幅控制畴壁漂移，并利用微磁模拟验证了理论预测。
AI.motivation: 探索利用线性振荡磁场而非传统旋转磁场或自旋极化电流来驱动铁磁材料中的畴壁运动，揭示惯性自旋动力学在磁补偿点附近的作用。
AI.method: 从包含场依赖动能项的铁磁拉格朗日量出发，推导出畴壁位置和方位角的集体坐标方程；结合弱静态垂直偏置磁场，分析面内振荡场下的畴壁动力学；通过微磁模拟验证解析结果。
AI.result: 发现周期性畴壁角切换可整流为有限平均漂移速度；低频下漂移速度与驱动频率成正比而非场振幅；存在截止频率，高于此频率畴壁角无法跟随驱动，平均运动被抑制；漂移的大小和方向可通过净自旋密度调节。
AI.conclusion: 线性振荡磁场可以作为铁磁体中频率控制畴壁运动的一种新机制，强调了磁补偿点附近惯性自旋动力学的重要性。

title: Visualizing Symmetry Broken Chern Insulators and their Quantum Melting
summary: In the presence of a magnetic field, electronic states of moiré quantum materials develop a Hofstadter spectrum that provides a unique setting for studying the interplay between band topology and strong electron-electron interaction. Using scanning tunneling microscopy, we study Hofstadter's states in bilayer graphene aligned with hexagonal BN and directly visualize the formation of interaction-driven symmetry breaking Chern insulators. Our measurements reveal the formation of phases that double, triple or quadruple the moiré unit cell at fractional filling of the Hofstadter bands, as well as states with complex intra-unit-cell wave functions. We visualize two distinct quantum phenomena in different Chern states, including quantum melting driven by the appearance and proliferation of topological defects, and a quantum transition co-occurring with phase competition and separation.

AI.tldr: 本文利用扫描隧道显微镜研究了双层石墨烯/六方氮化硼异质结中的霍夫施塔特态，直接观察到相互作用驱动的对称性破缺陈绝缘体，包括倍化、三倍化、四倍化莫尔超胞的相以及复杂胞内波函数，并展示了不同陈数态中的量子熔化与量子相变现象。
AI.motivation: 研究莫尔量子材料在磁场下的霍夫施塔特能谱中，能带拓扑与强电子-电子相互作用之间的相互影响机制。
AI.method: 采用扫描隧道显微术（STM）对双层石墨烯与六方氮化硼对齐结构进行实验观测。
AI.result: 观测到在霍夫施塔特能带分数填充下，莫尔超胞发生双倍、三倍、四倍化的对称性破缺陈绝缘体相；还观测到具有复杂胞内波函数的新态，以及两种不同陈数态下的量子熔化（拓扑缺陷出现与增殖驱动）和伴随相竞争与相分离的量子相变。
AI.conclusion: 实验直接证实了强相互作用下霍夫施塔特能谱中的对称性破缺与拓扑相变，为理解关联拓扑量子物态提供了新的实验依据。

title: Interpretable Material Spatial Intelligence for Discovery of Governing Microstructural Features
summary: Many material systems exhibit complex spatial and temporal interactions across multiple length scales and modalities that govern macroscopic behavior. Although Machine Learning (ML) is widely used in materials science to predict this behavior, most approaches still rely on handcrafted descriptors or aggregated representations that overlook spatial organization, limiting insight into governing mechanisms. We introduce Materials Spatial Intelligence (MSI), a framework inspired by spatial intelligence that learns directly from multimodal spatial observations of material systems. MSI encodes high-resolution microstructural and deformation data into shared latent representations that preserve spatial relationships while supporting property prediction, interpretation, and optimization. By combining multimodal representation learning, MSI identifies the key features governing mechanical behavior and property trade-offs in structural alloys. Beyond prediction, MSI enables feature-driven microstructure optimization and mechanism discovery. More broadly, MSI establishes a foundation for applying spatial intelligence to materials science, leveraging interpretable ML systems to accelerate scientific discovery and materiel design

AI.tldr: 本文提出Materials Spatial Intelligence (MSI)框架，通过直接从多模态空间观测数据中学习，保留空间关系的潜在表征，用于材料性能预测、解释和优化，推动材料科学中的空间智能应用。
AI.motivation: 现有ML方法在材料科学中依赖手工特征或聚合表征，忽略了空间组织信息，限制了对其控制机制的理解。作者希望建立能直接学习多模态空间观测数据的框架，以揭示材料行为的空间规律。
AI.method: MSI框架受空间智能启发，将高分辨率微观结构和变形数据编码为共享潜在表征，保留空间关系；通过多模态表征学习，支持性能预测、解释和优化。
AI.result: 在结构合金中，MSI成功识别出控制力学行为和性能权衡的关键特征；实现了特征驱动的微观结构优化和机制发现。
AI.conclusion: MSI为将空间智能应用于材料科学奠定了基础，利用可解释ML系统加速科学发现和材料设计。

title: Giant and Continuous Ionic Current Oscillation Induced by Dynamic Surface Charge Regulation in Cylindrical Mesopores
summary: Nanofluidic ionic oscillators based on the dynamic regulation of surface charges hold great promise for neuromorphic computing, biosensing, and ionic circuits. Here, by dynamically adjusting the local charge inversion on pore walls, we present a simple and effective strategy to achieve periodic current oscillations by harnessing the transient adsorption and desorption of Ca2+ ions in cylindrical mesopores under concentration gradients. Based on the combined precision current measurements and multiphysics simulations, we demonstrate that local overadsorption of Ca2+ ions may induce asymmetric bipolar charge distributions along the pore axis, which periodically reverses the direction of electroosmotic flow and modulates the local ion concentration inside the pore, generating highly regular current oscillations. Notably, both the oscillation frequency and the open-state probability of the pore vary nearly linearly with the applied voltage. Moreover, under dynamic voltage scanning, the system exhibits typical memristive hysteresis, and the switching between the open and closed states is highly reproducible. This work not only reveals the dynamic, heterogeneous surface charge regulation by divalent ions, but also provides a simple, material agnostic method for constructing ionic oscillators and memristors based on dynamic adsorption/desorption of multivalent ions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Ca²⁺动态吸附/脱附调控孔道表面电荷反转的纳米流体离子振荡器新策略，通过浓度梯度下圆柱形介孔中局部电荷反转诱导的不对称双极电荷分布，周期性反转电渗流方向并调制局部离子浓度，产生高度规则的电流振荡。振荡频率和开放态概率随电压线性变化，系统还表现出典型的忆阻滞回特性。
AI.motivation: 纳米流体离子振荡器在神经形态计算、生物传感和离子电路中具有重要应用前景，但现有方法通常依赖复杂的表面修饰或外部刺激。作者希望提出一种简单、材料无关的策略，利用多价离子的动态吸附/脱附实现周期性电流振荡。
AI.method: 在浓度梯度下，通过Ca²⁺在圆柱形介孔内的瞬态吸附和脱附，动态调节孔道表面电荷分布。结合精密电流测量和多物理场仿真，分析局部Ca²⁺过吸附导致的不对称双极电荷分布，进而周期性反转电渗流方向，调制孔内局部离子浓度，产生电流振荡。
AI.result: 实现了高度规则的电流振荡；振荡频率和开放态概率与外加电压呈近线性关系；动态电压扫描下系统表现出典型的忆阻滞回特性，且开闭态切换具有高度可重复性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅揭示了二价离子对表面电荷的动态异质性调控机制，还提供了一种简单、材料无关的通用方法，基于多价离子的动态吸附/脱附构建离子振荡器和忆阻器。

title: Quantum nuclear and band-dispersion effects recover near-UV absorption in short-hydrogen-bonded organic crystals
comment: 23 pages including Supplementary Information, 6 main figures, 1 main table
summary: Near-UV optical absorption is increasingly reported in hydrogen-bonded organic and biomolecular materials lacking aromatic or extended pi-conjugated chromophores, yet its microscopic origin remains unresolved and electronic-structure calculations often overestimate experimental absorption onsets. Here, we combine machine-learned interatomic potentials for large-scale classical and quantum nuclear sampling with periodic excited-state calculations to address this discrepancy in L-pyroglutamine ammonium, an experimentally established glutamine-derived crystal containing a well-resolved short hydrogen bond and exhibiting non-aromatic near-UV optical response. Using controlled in silico ion substitutions that vary the surrounding hydrogen-bond environment while preserving this scaffold, we compute optical spectra from configurations sampled along classical and quantum nuclear trajectories using hybrid-functional time-dependent density functional theory. We show that nuclear quantum effects stabilise proton-sharing configurations that are strongly suppressed classically, redshifting the lowest bright excitations by 0.5-0.8 eV and raising the fraction of configurations with bright excitations below 6 eV from approximately 3% to approximately 30%. Explicit Brillouin-zone sampling provides a further, mechanistically distinct redshift of 0.5-1.1 eV, reflecting modest but significant indirect electronic character. Only when both effects are incorporated does the calculated onset recover the experimental 3.8-4.5 eV range. These results establish quantum proton fluctuations and reciprocal-space convergence as cooperative but physically distinct ingredients required for predictive optical spectroscopy of strongly hydrogen-bonded molecular materials.

AI.tldr: 本文结合机器学习力场与量子核采样，发现核量子效应和布里渊区采样分别使L-焦谷氨酰胺铵晶体的近紫外吸收边红移0.5-0.8 eV和0.5-1.1 eV，二者协同才能准确预测实验观测的3.8-4.5 eV吸收范围，揭示了强氢键分子材料中量子质子涨落和倒易空间收敛是预测性光谱学不可或缺的物理要素。
AI.motivation: 非芳香族氢键有机/生物材料中近紫外光吸收的实验现象日益增多，但电子结构计算常高估吸收起始能量，其微观起源尚不明确，亟需解决理论与实验间的定量差异。
AI.method: 采用机器学习原子间势进行大规模经典和量子核采样，结合杂化泛函含时密度泛函理论(TDDFT)计算光学光谱；通过原位离子替换改变氢键环境，对比经典与量子核轨迹下的光谱差异，并系统考虑布里渊区采样效应。
AI.result: 核量子效应稳定了经典条件下被抑制的质子共享构型，使最低亮激发红移0.5-0.8 eV，6 eV以下亮激发构型比例从~3%提升至~30%；布里渊区采样额外提供0.5-1.1 eV红移，两者结合后计算吸收起始恢复至实验值3.8-4.5 eV范围。
AI.conclusion: 量子质子涨落（核量子效应）和倒易空间收敛（布里渊区采样）是强氢键分子材料预测性光谱学中协同但物理机制截然不同的两个必要条件。

title: Out-of-equilibrium scaling of the particle density in quantum fermionic wires after a critical quenching of the chemical potential
summary: We study the out-of-equilibrium scaling behavior of the particle density in quantum fermionic Kitaev wires, after instantaneous quantum quenches (QQs) of the chemical potential within their quantum critical region. The critical scaling of the ground-state particle density is known to be subleading at its Ising-like quantum transition, hidden by regular and logarithmic terms arising from peculiar mixings with the identity operator. This situation changes along the out-of-equilibrium dynamics arising from QQs of the chemical potential to the critical point, starting from the ground state for Hamiltonian parameters within the critical region. We analytically show that the difference between the post-QQ particle density and its critical value develops an out-of-equilibrium scaling behavior, in terms of the dynamic scaling variable $θ\sim t/ξ^z$ (where $t>0$ is the post-QQ time, $ξ$ is the length scale of the initial state, and $z$ is the dynamic critical exponent) associated with the post-QQ time evolution. The scaling function turns out to have a peculiar singular behavior in the $θ\to 0$ limit, apparently related to the anomalous equilibrium scaling behavior of the particle density at the starting point of the QQ protocol. This provides analytical evidence of earlier conjectures on the general emergence of post-QQ dynamic scaling behaviors of the subtracted particle density (supported by numerical finite-size scaling analyses), unlike their equilibrium counterpart which turns out to be dominated by nonuniversal contributions.

AI.tldr: 研究了一维Kitaev费米子链在化学势瞬时量子淬火后的非平衡标度行为，发现淬火后粒子密度差展现出动态标度行为，而其平衡态对应量则被非普适项主导。
AI.motivation: 平衡态下Kitaev链的粒子密度临界标度行为被与恒等算符混合所产生的正则项和对数项掩盖，因此作者希望在非平衡动力学中寻找更清晰的普适标度行为。
AI.method: 从处于临界区域内的基态出发，对化学势进行瞬时量子淬火至临界点，解析地分析淬火后粒子密度与临界值之差的动态标度行为，引入动态标度变量 θ ~ t/ξ^z。
AI.result: 淬火后粒子密度差呈现出非平衡动态标度行为，标度函数在 θ→0 极限下表现出奇异性，这与平衡态下粒子密度的反常标度行为有关。
AI.conclusion: 为之前关于淬火后粒子密度差呈现动态标度行为的猜想提供了解析证据，表明非平衡动力学可以揭示平衡态中被非普适项掩盖的普适标度行为。

title: Density-wave order enhances the phonon thermal Hall effect in a trilayer nickelate
summary: Ruddlesden--Popper nickelates have emerged as a promising platform for high-temperature superconductivity, yet the role of lattice degrees of freedom in their correlated normal state remains largely unexplored. Here, we report the observation of a finite phonon thermal Hall effect in the trilayer nickelate La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ at ambient pressure. Remarkably, the thermal Hall response is strongly enhanced below the density-wave transition at $T^*\approx140$ K, exhibiting two distinct plateaus in the thermal Hall resistivity. The characteristic energy scale extracted from the thermal Hall response ($\sim4.1$ meV) closely matches the magnon--phonon crossing span energy ($\sim3.2$ meV), pointing to magnon--phonon hybridization as the primary mechanism enhancing the thermal Hall effect. These results provide new insight into the interplay between lattice and spin excitations in nickelates, with implications for understanding both their superconductivity and the multiple possible origins of insulating thermal Hall signals.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀中常压下的有限声子热霍尔效应，发现该效应在密度波转变温度以下显著增强，并呈现两个平台，其能量尺度与磁振子-声子杂化能量匹配，揭示了晶格与自旋激发之间的相互作用。
AI.motivation: Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐是高温超导的新兴平台，但晶格自由度在其关联正常态中的作用尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 在常压下测量三层镍酸盐La₄Ni₃O₁₀的热霍尔效应，分析热霍尔电阻率随温度的变化，并提取特征能量尺度与磁振子-声子交叉能量进行对比。
AI.result: 观察到有限声子热霍尔效应，在密度波转变温度T*≈140 K以下显著增强，热霍尔电阻率呈现两个明显平台；提取的特征能量尺度（~4.1 meV）与磁振子-声子交叉能量（~3.2 meV）接近。
AI.conclusion: 磁振子-声子杂化是增强热霍尔效应的主要机制，为理解镍酸盐中超导性及绝缘热霍尔信号的多重可能起源提供了新见解。

title: Fine structure of the cyclotron resonance in heterobilayers of proximitized graphene and transition metal dichalcogenides
summary: A monolayer graphene and its Dirac electrons can be equipped with an enhanced spin-orbit coupling (SOC) when proximitized by other van der Waals (vdW) materials, such as transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs). In this work we analyze the cyclotron resonance (CR) absorption of such heterobilayers at quantizing magnetic fields in the presence of proximity-induced spin interactions, including the spin-pseudospin Rashba coupling. We evaluate the spin-textured wave functions of the Landau levels and calculate the absorption spectrum paying special attention to its spin proximity induced modifications. We reveal the formation of a fine double-peak structure of the main interband CR transitions, as well as the presence of additional spin-flip absorption, the combined cyclotron resonance (CCR), centered at different resonant frequencies. The selection rules for CCRs are identified and complemented by the perturbation theory analysis. We also discuss the polarization dependence of the absorption and the proximity-induced emerging magneto-optical responses. Our theory explains the effect of proximity-induced spin interactions for Dirac electrons cyclotron resonance and points out at its experimental verifications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了单层石墨烯与过渡金属硫族化物异质双层中，由邻近效应诱导的自旋-轨道耦合对回旋共振吸收的影响，发现了主峰双峰分裂和自旋翻转组合回旋共振等新现象。
AI.motivation: 探索邻近诱导自旋-轨道耦合（尤其是Rashba自旋-赝自旋耦合）如何修饰石墨烯狄拉克电子的回旋共振吸收谱。
AI.method: 在量子化磁场下计算自旋纹理化的朗道能级波函数，分析吸收谱；结合微扰理论分析选择定则。
AI.result: 发现主带间回旋共振跃迁出现精细双峰结构；观察到额外自旋翻转吸收（组合回旋共振）；阐明了CCR的选择定则及偏振依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 理论解释了邻近自旋相互作用对狄拉克电子回旋共振的影响，并为实验验证提供了可观测的磁光响应特征。

title: Notes on remanent magnetization measurements in superconductors and hard ferromagnets
summary: Data on zero applied field measurements of remanent magnetization and magnetic relaxation in a BCS superconductor LuNi2B2C and several hard ferromagnets are presented and compared. Apparent similarities and differences, in particular in Thermoremanent Magnetization (TRM) - like, Isothermal Remanent Magnetization (IRM) - like, and remanent magnetization measurements with zigzag temperature sweep measurements are outlined. It is discussed how these results could be relevant for the magnetization measurements in diamond anvil cells.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了BCS超导体LuNi2B2C与几种硬铁磁体在零场下的剩磁和磁弛豫测量数据，分析了热剩磁（TRM）、等温剩磁（IRM）以及锯齿形温度扫描剩磁测量的异同，并讨论了这些结果对金刚石压砧细胞中磁化测量的潜在影响。
AI.motivation: 探索超导体与硬铁磁体在剩磁行为上的相似性与差异，并评估其对高压磁化测量的影响。
AI.method: 通过零场下测量LuNi2B2C超导体和多种硬铁磁体的剩磁及磁弛豫，进行TRM-like、IRM-like及锯齿形温度扫描实验对比。
AI.result: 发现了超导体与硬铁磁体在剩磁行为上的表观相似性与差异，尤其是在不同温度扫描模式下的剩磁响应。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果对理解金刚石压砧细胞中的磁化测量具有重要参考价值。

title: Investigating causality between principal components in protein dynamics
summary: Principal component analysis (PCA) is widely used to characterize collective protein motions from molecular dynamics (MD) simulations. While PCA identifies the dominant modes of structural fluctuation, it does not reveal whether different principal components (PCs) causally influence each other. Here, we investigate this question using a recently introduced causal-discovery framework [Del Tatto et al, PNAS 2024], which allows to infer putative causal asymmetries between high-dimensional time series. We apply this approach to long-timescale MD trajectories of two proteins. By analyzing relationships among PCs, we construct directed networks describing how PCs influence one another across time scales. These directional relationships, whose existence is a necessary condition for the presence of a causal link, are not captured by conventional covariance-based analyses and provide information that is complementary to PCA and Time-lagged Independent Component Analysis (TICA). Our results suggest that our causal inference approach can uncover previously hidden aspects of the dynamical organization of protein motions and offer a new perspective on this very popular class of collective variables.

AI.tldr: 本文在分子动力学模拟的主成分分析基础上，引入因果发现框架，揭示了蛋白质主成分之间的有向影响关系，构建了跨时间尺度的有向网络，补充了传统协方差分析和TICA无法捕捉的因果信息。
AI.motivation: 传统的PCA只能识别蛋白质结构波动的主要模式，但无法揭示不同主成分（PCs）之间是否存在因果影响关系。作者希望探究PCs之间是否存在有向的因果性联系。
AI.method: 采用Del Tatto等人（PNAS 2024）提出的因果发现框架，对两种蛋白质的长时标MD模拟轨迹中的主成分关系进行分析，构建描述PCs之间跨时间尺度影响的有向网络。
AI.result: 成功构建了PCs之间的有向影响网络，发现了传统协方差分析和TICA无法捕捉的方向性关系，这些关系的存在是因果联系的必要条件。
AI.conclusion: 因果推断方法能够揭示蛋白质运动动态组织中此前隐藏的方面，为PCA这一经典集体变量提供了新的视角。

title: The impact of population heterogeneity on the redundancy principle
summary: Biological signaling is often governed by extreme value statistics, where a rapid response relies on the fastest few out of a large redundant group of searchers. While extreme first passage time (FPT) theory is well established for homogeneous ensembles, its sensitivity to population heterogeneity remains open. We show that averaging over a heterogeneous population of memoryless random walkers gives rise to ensemble self-reinforcement. This heterogeneity drastically changes both the FPT and minimum FPT densities relative to a homogeneous ensemble with identical mean rates. The modal and minimum FPTs are an order of magnitude smaller for heterogeneous populations relative to homogeneous ones. Our exact analytical predictions establish that population heterogeneity is a parameter that biology can exploit and not merely noise to be averaged away.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了异质性群体中极端首次通过时间（FPT）的统计特性，发现种群异质性会显著改变FPT分布，使得最快速响应时间比同质群体快一个数量级，表明异质性是一种可被生物学利用的参数而非噪声。
AI.motivation: 极端首次通过时间理论在同质群体中已有完善建立，但其对群体异质性的敏感性尚不清楚。作者想探究异质性如何影响生物学中依赖"最快少数搜寻者"的快速响应机制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析对异质性无记忆随机游走者群体进行平均化，推导出异质群体与同质群体（具有相同平均速率）的FPT和最小FPT密度对比。
AI.result: 异质性导致群体自强化效应，使得模态和最小FPT比同质群体小一个数量级，FPT和最小FPT密度发生显著改变。
AI.conclusion: 种群异质性不是需要被平均化的噪声，而是生物学可以主动利用的调控参数，用于优化快速反应信号。

title: Nonrelativistic Spin-Orbit-Coupling Effects in Odd-Parity Coplanar Magnets
summary: Spin-orbit coupling (SOC) is a relativistic effect that underpins a broad spectrum of phenomena in condensed matter physics, from topological phases of matter to spintronic functionality. Its relativistic origin, however, restricts strong SOC to heavy-element materials and locks spin-momentum texture into a fixed, material-specific pattern. Here we show that odd-parity coplanar magnets offer a nonrelativistic pathway to highly tunable SOC effects. We construct a bilayer coplanar magnet via symmetry-guided stacking of two monolayer odd-parity altermagnets and demonstrate that Rashba, Weyl, and Dresselhaus spin textures can all be realized, and that the spin texture can be switched between these forms simply by tuning the layer Neel vector. Through the spin Edelstein effect and the realization of fully gapped chiral topological superconducting phases, we demonstrate that this nonrelativistic SOC achieves physical equivalence to its relativistic counterpart. Our findings identify a new class of odd-parity coplanar magnets as a versatile platform for engineering SOC effects.

AI.tldr: 本文通过对称性引导堆叠奇数宇称共面反铁磁体单层，构建 bilayer 体系，实现了可高度调控的非相对论性自旋-轨道耦合效应，包括 Rashba、Weyl 和 Dresselhaus 自旋织构，并通过自旋 Edelstein 效应和拓扑超导相证明其与相对论性 SOC 的物理等价性。
AI.motivation: 传统相对论性 SOC 局限于重元素材料，且自旋-动量锁定模式固定、不可调控。作者希望寻找一种非相对论途径来实现高度可调的 SOC 效应。
AI.method: 通过对称性指导，堆叠两个奇数宇称反铁磁体单层构建 bilayer 共面磁体；通过调节层间 Néel 矢量实现不同自旋织构的切换；利用自旋 Edelstein 效应和手性拓扑超导相验证物理等价性。
AI.result: 成功在 bilayer 体系中实现了 Rashba、Weyl 和 Dresselhaus 三种自旋织构，并可通过调控 Néel 矢量相互切换；实现了全能隙手性拓扑超导相。
AI.conclusion: 奇数宇称共面磁体可作为工程化 SOC 效应的多功能平台，为非相对论性自旋电子学和拓扑物态研究提供了新方向。

title: Fluctuation exchange study on the electron-hole asymmetry of the superconductivity across 1/3 filling in the trilayer Hubbard model
summary: We study within the fluctuation exchange approximation the trilayer Hubbard model where three layers of the Hubbard model are coupled by large interlayer hoppings so that the overlap of the bonding, nonbonding, and antibonding bands is relatively small. We pay special attention to the band fillings close to 1/3, for which the bonding and nonbonding bands as a whole are close to half filling. For relatively small values of the onsite $U$, superconductivity roughly exhibits electron-hole symmetric behavior, as expected for a nearly half-filled two-band system. By contrast, an asymmetry appears when $U$ becomes large, where superconductivity is more favored in the hole-doped regime, i.e., in the regime where electrons are removed from 1/3 filling. We attribute this asymmetry to the asymmetric renormalization of the bonding, nonbonding, and antibonding bands when $U$ is large.

AI.tldr: 本文通过涨落交换近似研究了三层Hubbard模型，重点关注1/3填充附近的情况。当U较小时超导呈现电子-空穴对称性，而U较大时在空穴掺杂区域更有利于超导，这种不对称性归因于大U下能带的重整化不对称。
AI.motivation: 探究三层Hubbard模型中不同能带（成键、非键、反键）之间的相互作用对超导电性的影响，特别是在1/3填充附近的电子-空穴不对称性。
AI.method: 采用涨落交换近似（Fluctuation Exchange Approximation, FLEX）方法研究三层层间耦合较大的Hubbard模型，分析不同U值和填充率下的超导性质。
AI.result: 小U时超导呈现近似电子-空穴对称行为；大U时出现不对称性，空穴掺杂区域（低于1/3填充）更有利于超导。
AI.conclusion: 大U下超导的电子-空穴不对称性源于成键、非键、反键能带在大U下的不对称重整化效应。

title: Generalized Fourier's law in mesoscopic systems
summary: Fourier's law fails when the mean free path of the energy carriers becomes comparable to the length and time scales over which the temperature field varies. We derive a thermodynamically consistent generalization in which the conductivity is promoted to a nonlocal memory operator $\bmκ_{\mathrm{eff}}(\mathbf{k},ω)$, obtained by combining mesoscopic nonequilibrium thermodynamics with the Mori--Kubo--Zwanzig projection-operator formalism. The Onsager kernel decomposes exactly into a tensor sum over vibrational normal modes weighted by their Bose heat capacities and relaxation functions, and satisfies the second law by construction. Two consequences follow. First, because the modal weights carry the directional group velocity, the kernel is anisotropic, so a nominally isotropic crystal exhibits direction-dependent apparent conductivities $Λ_z\neqΛ_r$. Second, in a pump--probe experiment the modulation frequency does not introduce temporal memory but sets the probed wavevector through the thermal penetration depth, so the suppression of the apparent conductivity measured by time-domain thermoreflectance on Si, Ge and Si$_{1-x}$Ge$_x$ is a spatial-nonlocality effect set by a sub-micron carrier mean free path. Fitting the data of Wilson and Cahill yields nonlocality lengths of $0.25$--$0.4~μ$m consistent with the mean-free-path spectra of these crystals. The framework supplies a thermodynamic foundation for the two-channel ballistic/diffusive picture of nondiffusive heat transport.

AI.tldr: 当能量载体的平均自由程与温度场变化的时空尺度相当时，傅里叶定律失效。本文通过将热导率提升为非局域记忆算子，推导出热力学自洽的广义傅里叶定律，并证明在泵浦-探测实验中观察到的表观热导率抑制是空间非局域性效应，而非时间记忆效应。
AI.motivation: 傅里叶定律在微纳米尺度（载能子平均自由程与温度场变化尺度可比）下失效，需要热力学自洽的非局域推广。
AI.method: 结合介观非平衡热力学与Mori-Kubo-Zwanzig投影算符形式，将热导率推广为波矢和频率依赖的非局域记忆算子；Onsager核分解为振动简正模的张量和，由玻色热容和弛豫函数加权。
AI.result: (1) 即使名义上各向同性的晶体，其表观热导率也呈现各向异性 (Λ_z ≠ Λ_r)；(2) 时域热反射测量中，调制频率并非引入时间记忆，而是通过热穿透深度设定探测波矢，Si、Ge、SiGe的表观热导率抑制是空间非局域性效应，拟合得到0.25–0.4 μm的非局域长度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为弹道/扩散双通道图像提供了热力学基础，证明非扩散热输运来自空间非局域性。

title: Enhancing quantum-classical configuration interaction methods using a neural-network classifier
summary: Selected configuration interaction methods achieve near-exact electronic structure calculations by iteratively constructing compact variational spaces, but their efficiency depends critically on the heuristics used to identify important determinants. Here, we introduce a data-driven selection framework that recasts determinant importance as a binary classification task and integrates a neural-network classifier into the iterative CI workflow through an active-learning loop. At each iteration, a random subset of candidate determinants is labelled via temporary diagonalisation, and the trained classifier guides selection of the remaining configurations. We demonstrate the utility of this framework for both classical and quantum CI methods by calculating the ground-state energy of a diatomic molecule. Our method achieves result parity with traditional configuration interaction methods at substantially lower computational cost: roughly a $\times 5$ reduction in memory and per-iteration cost for the classical cHCI variant, and convergence in markedly fewer iterations for the quantum-classical cSQD variant. These results establish classifier-assisted determinant selection as a lightweight, method-agnostic tool for compressing variational spaces and accelerating both classical and hybrid quantum-classical configuration interaction algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的配置选择框架，将行列式重要性判定转化为二分类任务，通过主动学习循环集成神经网络分类器到迭代CI工作流中，在经典和量子CI方法上实现了与传统方法相当的精度，同时显著降低了计算成本（经典cHCI变体内存和每迭代成本降低约5倍，量子-经典cSQD变体收敛迭代次数大幅减少）。
AI.motivation: 传统选组态相互作用方法依赖启发式规则来识别重要行列式，效率受限。作者希望通过数据驱动的方式，将行列式重要性判定转化为机器学习分类任务，从而更高效地构建紧凑变分空间。
AI.method: 提出一个主动学习循环框架：每轮迭代中，对随机子集候选行列式通过临时对角化标注标签，训练神经网络二分类器，再由训练好的分类器指导剩余候选配置的选择。
AI.result: 在双原子分子基态能量计算中，经典cHCI变体实现约5倍内存和每迭代成本降低；量子-经典cSQD变体收敛所需迭代次数显著减少；计算精度与传统方法持平。
AI.conclusion: 分类器辅助的行列式选择是一种轻量级、方法无关的工具，能够有效压缩变分空间，加速经典和混合量子-经典组态相互作用算法。

title: From Continuous-Time Random Walks to Laplace Tails
summary: During Brownian motion, the displacement is normally distributed, a classical fact aligned with the central limit theorem. However, single particle tracking in complex media such as glasses, living cells, and colloidal suspensions often reveals pronounced exponential decay of the displacement distribution, known as Laplace tails. In a short letter, two of us presented the emergence of Laplace tails in the continuous time random walk (CTRW) framework. Here, a detailed complementary study is presented. By exploring the behavior of $Q_t(n)$, the probability that exactly $n$ renewals occur during time $t$, we develop a rate function-like framework for this quantity, valid for finite $t$. We show that $Q_t(n)$ exhibits exponential tails, which in turn give rise to exponential tails of the positional probability density function $P(x,t)$. Favorable comparison to finite-time numerical simulations and asymptotic large deviation rate functions establishes the validity of our results over a wide temporal range.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个有限时间速率函数框架，揭示了连续时间随机游走（CTRW）中位移分布拉普拉斯尾部的涌现机制，通过分析跳跃次数概率$Q_t(n)$的指数尾部来解释位置概率密度$P(x,t)$的指数衰减行为。
AI.motivation: 布朗运动中位移分布通常是高斯分布，但复杂介质（如玻璃、活细胞、胶体悬浮液）中单粒子追踪常观测到指数衰减的拉普拉斯尾部。作者希望建立理论框架解释这一现象。
AI.method: 基于连续时间随机游走（CTRW）框架，研究时间$t$内恰好发生$n$次跳跃的概率$Q_t(n)$，发展适用于有限时间的速率函数理论，揭示$Q_t(n)$的指数尾部，并推导其对位置概率密度$P(x,t)$的影响。
AI.result: 建立了$Q_t(n)$的有限时间速率函数框架，证明了$Q_t(n)$具有指数尾部，进而推导出$P(x,t)$的指数尾部（拉普拉斯尾部）。数值模拟和大偏差速率函数验证了结果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CTRW框架能够解释复杂介质中位移分布拉普拉斯尾部的涌现，所发展的有限时间速率函数方法在广泛时间范围内与数值结果吻合良好。

title: Andreev exceptional points in Josephson junctions formed by minimal Kitaev chains
summary: We consider Josephson junctions formed by two minimal Kitaev chains and investigate how the interplay between non-Hermiticity and superconducting phase difference enables the realization of stable topological states that do not exist in the Hermitian realm. In particular, we focus on non-Hermiticity produced by coupling the minimal Kitaev chain Josephson junction to normal reservoirs, which renders the system open and characterized by a complex Andreev spectrum. Interestingly, we find that this complex spectrum hosts second order exceptional points, where a pair of eigenvalues and their respective eigenvectors coalesce, and are fully controlled by the superconducting phase difference. Depending on the spatial unequal distribution of non-Hermiticity, these Andreev exceptional points can appear at zero or finite energies connecting stable energy lines protected by non-Hermitian topology. Moreover, tuning the system parameters, such as onsite energies, non-Hermiticity, or electron cotunneling, the Andreev exceptional points give rise to Andreev exceptional lines enclosing protected two-dimensional zero real energy areas. We also discuss potential detection schemes of Andreev exceptional points by using local and nonlocal conductance signatures. Our results demonstrate the utility of non-Hermiticity from normal reservoirs as a useful resource for engineering non-Hermitian topological phases in minimal Kitaev chain Josephson junctions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究由两个最小Kitaev链构成的约瑟夫森结，发现通过正常库耦合引入的非厄米性与超导相位差协同作用，可实现厄米系统中不存在的稳定拓扑态。研究揭示了复Andreev谱中的二阶例外点、例外线及零实能区域，并探讨了通过局域和非局域电导探测这些例外点的方案。
AI.motivation: 探索非厄米性与超导相位差在最小Kitaev链约瑟夫森结中的协同作用，实现厄米系统中不存在的新型稳定拓扑态，挖掘正常库引入的非厄米性作为拓扑工程资源的潜力。
AI.method: 将最小Kitaev链约瑟夫森结耦合到正常库引入非厄米性，通过分析复Andreev谱研究二阶例外点、例外线及零实能区域，并考虑空间非均匀分布的非厄米性及系统参数（在位能、非厄米强度、电子共隧穿）的调控作用。
AI.result: 发现复Andreev谱中存在可由超导相位差完全控制的二阶例外点；非厄米性空间分布不均时，例外点可在零能或有限能出现，连接受非厄米拓扑保护的能量线；通过参数调控，例外点可演化为包围二维零实能区域的例外线。
AI.conclusion: 正常库引入的非厄米性可作为工程非厄米拓扑相的有效资源，在最小Kitaev链约瑟夫森结中实现新型拓扑态，并提供了基于电导测量的实验探测方案。

title: Magnetoelectric flat band induced by a $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ charge density wave in monolayer CrSe$_2$
summary: We investigate the electronic and magnetic properties of the polar $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ charge-density-wave (CDW) phase of CrSe$_2$ using ab initio calculations. The CDW introduces a polar distortion out of the van der Waals plane that couples to the spin-polarized Cr d states resulting in a remarkably flat electronic band exactly at the Fermi level. We provide a microscopic understanding of the origin of the flat band by analyzing in detail the structural reconstruction, the effects of orbital hybridization, crystal-field splittings, spin-orbit coupling and electronic correlations. Our calculations show that due to the polar nature of the CDW distortion, an electric field can act as an external switch to induce the CDW phase, providing a way to manipulate strong correlations in the system.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，研究了CrSe₂中极性√3×√3电荷密度波（CDW）相的电子和磁学性质，发现CDW引起的极性畸变与自旋极化的Cr d态耦合，在费米能级处产生一条非常平坦的电子能带，并且电场可以作为外部开关来诱导CDW相。
AI.motivation: 探究CrSe₂中极性CDW相的电子和磁学性质，特别是理解平坦电子能带的微观起源，并探索通过电场调控强关联体系的可能性。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理（ab initio）计算，分析了结构重构、轨道杂化、晶体场劈裂、自旋-轨道耦合以及电子关联效应。
AI.result: CDW引起的极性畸变与自旋极化的Cr d态耦合，在费米能级处产生一条异常平坦的电子能带。电场可作为外部开关诱导CDW相。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了极性CDW相中平坦能带的微观机制，并提出利用电场操控该体系的强关联效应，为相关材料的功能化设计提供了新思路。

title: Reversible non-equilibrium phase transformation in amorphous germanium
summary: First principles molecular dynamics simulations of germanium reveal a reversible liquid-glass transition below the equilibrium melting point with a wide hysteresis loop. Direct calculation of the liquid and amorphous state free energies, enabled by absolute entropy calculations, verify that the transition is first order in character between two metastable phases. These results lend credence to models of explosive recrystallization from amorphous Ge thin films, through a metastable liquid state and finally reaching the low temperature crystalline structure.

AI.tldr: 通过第一性原理分子动力学模拟，发现锗在平衡熔点以下存在可逆的液-玻璃态转变，具有宽滞后回线。绝对熵计算验证了该转变是两个亚稳相之间的一级相变，支持了非晶锗薄膜通过亚稳态液态实现爆炸性再结晶的模型。
AI.motivation: 探索锗在低于平衡熔点时是否存在液-玻璃态转变，并验证其相变性质，为理解非晶锗薄膜的爆炸性再结晶机制提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理分子动力学模拟，结合绝对熵计算，直接计算液态和非晶态的自由能，分析相变的热力学特征。
AI.result: 发现锗在平衡熔点以下存在可逆液-玻璃转变，具有宽滞后回线；自由能计算证实该转变是亚稳相之间的一级相变。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为非晶锗薄膜通过亚稳态液态实现爆炸性再结晶的模型提供了热力学支持，揭示了锗中亚稳态相变的重要机制。

title: Dynamic Response Functions for Cavity Quantum Electrodynamics Hartree-Fock Theory
summary: Frequency-dependent linear and quadratic response functions are implemented for a cavity quantum electrodynamics (QED) generalization of Hartree-Fock (HF) theory. Dynamic electric dipole polarizability, optical rectification hyperpolarizability, and second harmonic generation hyperpolarizability tensors are evaluated for molecules strongly coupled to a single-mode optical cavity, and the results are benchmarked against the same tensors obtained from real-time time-dependent QED-HF simulations. Substantial cavity-induced changes to the frequency-dependent properties are observed for certain perturbing frequencies at large electron-photon coupling strengths. We also find special perturbing frequencies at which there is no cavity effect, regardless of the coupling strength.

AI.tldr: 本文在腔量子电动力学（QED）框架下，将频率依赖的线性与二次响应函数推广至Hartree-Fock（HF）理论。通过计算强耦合到单模光学腔的分子的动态电极化率、光学整流超极化率和二次谐波超极化率张量，并将结果与实时含时QED-HF模拟进行基准对比，发现强电子-光子耦合下某些频率的响应性质发生显著变化，同时存在不受耦合强度影响的特殊频率。
AI.motivation: 研究分子与光学腔强耦合时，频率依赖的线性与非线性光学响应性质的变化规律，特别是腔QED效应对动态极化率和超极化率的影响。
AI.method: 在QED框架下将频率依赖的线性与二次响应函数推广至HF理论，计算动态电偶极极化率、光学整流超极化率和二次谐波超极化率张量，并与实时含时QED-HF模拟结果进行基准对比。
AI.result: 强电子-光子耦合下，某些扰动频率的响应性质发生显著腔诱导变化；同时存在不受耦合强度影响的特殊扰动频率。
AI.conclusion: 腔QED效应可显著改变分子在特定频率下的光学响应性质，但存在不受腔耦合影响的“零点”频率，这为调控光-物质相互作用提供了新见解。

title: Anomalous Floquet Heating from Sparse Long-Range Interactions
summary: Regular lattices of interacting particles under a periodic drive typically heat with rate $γ\sim e^{-\mathcal{O}(ω)}$ which is exponentially suppressed in drive frequency $ω$. Here, we show that sparse infinite-range interactions, which have recently become accessible in quantum simulators, can lead to anomalous heating with rate $γ\sim e^{-\mathcal{O}(\sqrtω)}$. This anomaly originates from the broad distribution of coordination numbers across the network: as the driving frequency increases, heating becomes dominated by sites with larger coordination numbers, making the characteristic local energy scale relevant for heating grow with frequency. For small-world networks, we develop an analytic theory that thoroughly matches our large scale numerics. Finally, we discuss how network topology can serve as a control knob for engineering non-equilibrium phases of matter. Our results uncover a new mechanism for Floquet heating and suggest new routes toward stabilizing nonequilibrium phases in driven systems with programmable interaction networks.

AI.tldr: 本文发现稀疏无限范围相互作用的量子模拟器中的周期性驱动加热表现出反常的亚指数行为，其加热率γ∼e^{-O(√ω)}，而非通常的γ∼e^{-O(ω)}。这是由于网络配位数分布广泛，高频下高热配位数主导加热过程。这一发现揭示了Floquet加热的新机制，并为通过网络拓扑调控非平衡态提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 传统周期驱动系统（Floquet系统）的加热率随驱动频率指数抑制（γ∼e^{-O(ω)}），但最近量子模拟器中可实现的稀疏无限范围相互作用可能导致反常加热行为。作者希望探索这种新型相互作用网络是否以及如何改变加热标度律。
AI.method: 作者对稀疏无限范围相互作用网络（小世界网络）中的周期性驱动加热进行理论分析，开发了解析理论，并通过大规模数值模拟验证。通过考虑配位数分布，揭示高频下高配位数主导加热的机制。
AI.result: 加热率变为γ∼e^{-O(√ω)}，这是对传统指数抑制的显著修正。小世界网络的解析理论与大规模数值模拟高度吻合。网络拓扑结构可作为调控非平衡物质相的控制旋钮。
AI.conclusion: 发现了Floquet加热的新机制，为在可编程相互作用网络的驱动系统中稳定非平衡相提供了新途径。

title: On Degeneracies of Density, Magnetic, and Pairing Responses: How Competing Orders Echo Underlying Symmetries in the Hubbard Model
summary: Strongly correlated electron systems often display competing or even intertwined ordering tendencies, hinting to extremely close or degenerate many-electron energies. While degeneracies are directly rooted in the underlying symmetries of the problem under investigation, their multifaceted effects on different response functions and their mutual relations often remain elusive. Here we put this subject on a rigorous basis by investigating the degeneracies of charge, spin, and pairing susceptibilities for the unfrustrated, bipartite Hubbard model. Exploiting its pseudospin symmetry, we analytically derive the mutual relations between these response functions for generic spatial modulations, highly relevant, e.g., for the competition of stripe and superconducting orders. By means of two-particle numerical simulations we demonstrate the occurrence of a simultaneous $d$-wave pairing/$d$-density wave (loop current) instability in the vicinity of the metal-insulator transition, driven by short-ranged spin fluctuations for the two-dimensional case. We show how this degeneracy is gradually lifted by geometrical frustration, which favors superconductivity. Our study provides a general tool for revealing symmetry relations in correlated electron systems and establishes a unifying perspective on the nature of their intermingled charge/loop current, pairing, and spin orders.

AI.tldr: 本文严格推导了无阻挫双分格点Hubbard模型下电荷、自旋和配对 susceptibilities 的简并关系，利用赝自旋对称性建立了一般空间调制下的响应函数关联，并通过双粒子数值模拟展示了二维情形下d波配对/d-密度波（环流）的不稳定性，揭示了几何阻挫如何解除简并并倾向于超导态。
AI.motivation: 强关联电子系统中常出现竞争甚至交织的序，其简并性源于对称性，但不同响应函数之间的多重效应及其相互关系仍不清楚。本研究旨在严格建立这些简并关系的基础。
AI.method: 利用无阻挫双分格点Hubbard模型的赝自旋对称性，解析推导电荷、自旋和配对 susceptibilities 在一般空间调制下的相互关联；结合双粒子数值模拟，研究二维情况下金属-绝缘体转变附近的不稳定性。
AI.result: 发现了d波配对/d-密度波（环流）在金属-绝缘体转变附近同时发生的不稳定性，由短程自旋涨落驱动；几何阻挫逐渐解除这种简并，有利于超导。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为揭示关联电子系统中的对称性关系提供了通用工具，并建立了电荷/环流、配对和自旋序交织本质的统一视角。

title: Observation of even-denominator fractional quantum Hall states at $ν= 3/4$ and 5/4 in the lowest Landau level
summary: Two-dimensional electron systems (2DESs) confined to wide GaAs quantum wells provide a unique platform to study exotic fractional quantum Hall states (FQHSs) because the 2DES has a bilayer charge distribution with significant interlayer tunneling. Precise control over the 2DES density allows the tuning of the interlayer tunneling over a wide range. Here, we present our discovery of new even-denominator FQHSs in the lowest Landau level (orbital index \textit{N} = 0) at filling factors $ν= 3/4$ and 5/4 in an ultrahigh-quality 2DES confined to a 72.5-nm-wide GaAs quantum well. The ground states at $ν= 3/4$ and 5/4 both evolve from composite fermion Fermi seas to FQHSs as the density is raised so that interlayer tunneling is sufficiently reduced and the 2DES becomes two-component, signaled by the behavior of the FQHSs flanking $ν= 3/4$ and 5/4. The two-component nature of the $ν=3/4$ and 5/4 FQHSs is also evident from their extreme sensitivity to the bilayer charge distribution symmetry: both states disappear quickly when the charge distribution is made asymmetric by only $\simeq 2\%$. We find a natural explanation for the 3/4 and 5/4 FQHSs in terms of two states linked by particle-hole symmetry, and using the Scarola-Jain bilayer composite fermion framework which is a generalization of the well-known, two-component, Halperin state ($Ψ_{331}$ state). Our observations elucidate the crucial role of competing energy and length scales in wide quantum wells in stabilizing new ground states.

AI.tldr: 本文在超高质量的宽GaAs量子阱中，发现了最低朗道能级（N=0）上新的偶数分母分数量子霍尔态（FQHSs），填充因子ν=3/4和5/4。这些态在二维电子系统（2DES）密度升高、层间隧穿充分降低、系统变为双组分时出现，且对电荷分布对称性极度敏感。作者利用Scarola-Jain bilayer composite fermion框架提供了理论解释，并指出这些态与Halperin Ψ_331态相关。
AI.motivation: 宽GaAs量子阱中的二维电子系统具有双层电荷分布和显著的层间隧穿效应，是研究新奇分数量子霍尔态的独特平台。此前尚未在最低朗道能级发现ν=3/4和5/4的偶数分母FQHS，作者希望通过精确调控密度来探索这些新态。
AI.method: 采用超高质量的72.5 nm宽GaAs量子阱，通过精确调控2DES密度来改变层间隧穿强度；通过测量FQHSs随密度的演化、电荷分布对称性扰动实验以及分析相邻FQHS的行为来表征系统性质；利用Scarola-Jain bilayer composite fermion理论框架进行解释。
AI.result: 首次在最低朗道能级发现ν=3/4和5/4的偶数分母FQHSs；这些态仅在密度足够高、层间隧穿充分降低时才出现；对电荷分布对称性极度敏感，约2%的不对称性即可使态消失；两个态之间具有粒子-空穴对称关系。
AI.conclusion: 宽量子阱中竞争的能量和长度尺度对于稳定新的基态至关重要；ν=3/4和5/4 FQHSs本质上是双组分态，可用Scarola-Jain bilayer composite fermion框架（推广的Halperin Ψ_331态）自然解释；粒子-空穴对称性在两个态之间成立。

title: Low-temperature magnetic-field-driven thermal oscillator based on metal-superconductor joint
summary: Thermal control is one of the important technologies for fundamental science and thermal management. Among them, thermal oscillators have been in demands in the field of materials science and device application. In general, flexible frequency, amplitude, and waveform are needed for useful thermal oscillator, and the stability of the average temperature is also highly required. However, thermal oscillators based on an AC-current-driven heater require complicated control of input power to achieve the above-mentioned flexibility and stability of the outputs. Here, we demonstrate that magnetically-driven thermal oscillators fabricated using a metal-superconductor (Cu-Pb) joint achieve those requirements easily by tuning the applied magnetic field (H). A DC-current-driven heater is attached on the metal (Cu) side, and the superconductor (Pb) edge is attached to thermal bath. We use a sharp and huge change in thermal conductivity at the superconducting transition of the Pb wire to generate thermal oscillation at the Cu-wire side. A sine-shaped thermal oscillation with an amplitude of 180 mK and a frequency of 0.17 Hz is observed with highly stable average temperature. Furthermore, a larger amplitude is achieved in a square-shaped oscillation with a larger H amplitude. Our thermal oscillator with temperature stability, large amplitude, and relatively high frequency will work as a flexible AC heat source at cryogenic temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于金属-超导体（Cu-Pb）结的磁驱动热振荡器，通过调节外加磁场即可灵活控制振荡的频率、幅度和波形，并实现稳定的平均温度，避免了传统交流电流驱动热振荡器需复杂控制输入功率的问题。
AI.motivation: 热振荡器在材料科学和器件应用中需求广泛，需要灵活的频率、幅度和波形以及稳定的平均温度。然而，传统的基于交流电流驱动加热器的热振荡器需要复杂的输入功率控制才能实现上述灵活性和稳定性，因此亟需一种更简便的实现方案。
AI.method: 利用金属（Cu）-超导体（Pb）结制备磁驱动热振荡器；在Cu侧安装直流电流驱动加热器，Pb侧连接热浴；利用Pb线在超导转变时热导率的急剧大幅变化，通过施加磁场（H）调控产生热振荡。
AI.result: 观测到振幅180 mK、频率0.17 Hz的正弦形热振荡，平均温度高度稳定；更大的磁场振幅下实现了方波形振荡并获得更大的振幅。
AI.conclusion: 该热振荡器具有温度稳定性好、振幅大、频率较高（相对低温环境）的优点，可作为低温环境下灵活的交流热源使用。

title: The Finite Coulomb Lattice Sum: A Resolution of Conditional Convergence through Exact Shape and Size
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters (2026)
summary: This work examines conditionally convergent Coulomb lattice sums under periodic boundary conditions. The recently developed finite lattice sum cleanly decomposes the series into three distinct components: a periodic bulk term $ν_{\rm pbc}$, a shape-dependent non-periodic boundary term $ν_{\rm b}$, and a finite-size correction term $ν_{\rm corr}$. This rigorous formulation explicitly parameterizes the geometry of a finite lattice by its exact shape and size and takes an effective pairwise form. We analyze it in detail and compare it with various derivations of lattice sums in the literature. Perspectives on future applications are discussed, including analytical developments for arbitrarily shaped crystals and numerical mesh-type algorithms for condensed matter simulations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究周期边界条件下条件收敛的库仑晶格求和，提出一种将级数分解为周期体项、形状依赖的非周期边界项和有限尺寸修正项的有限晶格求和方法，并与文献中的多种推导进行了比较。
AI.motivation: 解决周期边界条件下条件收敛的库仑晶格求和的精确分解问题，将有限晶格的几何形状和大小显式参数化。
AI.method: 采用有限晶格求和方法，将级数干净地分解为三个不同组成部分：周期体项ν_pbc、形状依赖的非周期边界项ν_b和有限尺寸修正项ν_corr，并采用有效的成对形式。
AI.result: 该公式显式参数化了有限晶格的确切形状和大小，并与文献中多种晶格求和的推导进行了详细比较分析。
AI.conclusion: 讨论了未来应用前景，包括任意形状晶体的解析发展和凝聚态模拟的数值网格型算法。

title: Exact log-odds representation and mean-field criticality of a growing social group model
summary: We present an exact analytical reformulation of a growing social group model -- a Hamiltonian-free nonequilibrium process in which a group grows by noisy, consensus-driven admission. Cast as a gradient flow on logarithmic time, the fixed-point structure collapses to a single self-consistent equation: $\arctanh(φ^*) = m \cdot \arctanh(αφ^*)$, where $φ$ is the polarization, $α=1-2η$ the evaluation reliability, and $m$ the number of evaluators. The equation has a direct log-odds interpretation: each verdict contributes log-likelihood ratio $2\arctanh(αφ)$; unanimity accumulates $m$ independent evidence pieces. The dynamics thus constitutes an exact mean-field theory of self-consistent inference, ordering when the collective gain $mα$ overcomes the dilution of growth. We develop a systematic three-layer framework: core theory (Landau-like effective potential, comparison with the mean-field Ising model, and features without equilibrium counterpart), mathematical foundations (criticality from correlated verdicts, Pólya-urn martingale convergence, and an RG-like flow with group size as scale), and complementary perspectives on irreversibility and information geometry. A frozen-$N$ Freidlin--Wentzell quasipotential yields Kramers-type escape estimates for metastable states, while Monte Carlo simulations collapse onto a parameter-free deterministic master curve on logarithmic time. Systematic comparison with the mean-field Ising model reveals shared critical exponents but a nested arctanh structure unique to growth. These results provide a detailed analytical characterization of a minimal model of growth-driven collective behavior and map which elements of the equilibrium critical toolbox -- suitably reinterpreted -- survive without a Hamiltonian.

AI.tldr: 本文对一类无哈密顿量的非平衡增长社会群体模型进行了精确解析重构，将其映射为对数时间上的梯度流，并通过单一自洽方程 $\arctanh(φ^*) = m \cdot \arctanh(αφ^*)$ 描述极化动力学。该模型等价于自洽推断的平均场理论，具有对数几率比解释，并建立了包含核心理论、数学基础和互补视角的三层框架。与平均场Ising模型共享临界指数，但嵌套的 $\arctanh$ 结构为增长过程所独有。
AI.motivation: 为无哈密顿量的非平衡增长群体过程建立精确解析理论，揭示其与平衡统计力学（如Ising模型）的深层联系与本质差异，填补该领域缺乏严格解析处理的空白。
AI.method: 将群体增长模型重新表述为对数时间上的梯度流，推导出单一自洽方程；构建三层分析框架：核心理论（Landau有效势、与Ising模型对比）、数学基础（临界性、Pólya-urn鞅收敛、RG-like流）、互补视角（不可逆性与信息几何）。使用Freidlin-Wentzell拟势估计亚稳态，MC模拟验证确定性主曲线。
AI.result: 推导出 $\arctanh(φ^*) = m \cdot \arctanh(αφ^*)$ 这一自洽方程，揭示了极化动力学的对数几率比解释；发现与平均场Ising模型共享临界指数，但嵌套 $\arctanh$ 结构为增长过程独有；MC模拟在时间对数尺度上坍缩为无参数确定性主曲线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为增长驱动的集体行为提供了一个最小模型的完整解析刻画，展示了平衡临界工具箱中的哪些元素——经适当重新解释后——可以在无哈密顿量的非平衡系统中存活。

title: The Interplay of Thermal Melting and Pump Driven Melting of Charge Order: A Two-Temperature Study of the Holstein Model
summary: Charge order driven by electron-phonon coupling is well understood at equilibrium but pump-probe experiments raise a new question: how does this order melt and recover after strong photoexcitation? A pump pulse promotes carriers across the charge-order gap and creates a nonequilibrium high-energy electronic population. In a closed system the subsequent dynamics is constrained by energy conservation. In an `open system' - where the system is coupled to a thermal bath at some temperature $T_{\rm bath}$ - there are new fluctuation and dissipation processes at play. One can attempt a computational scheme that incorporates coupling of electrons to a laser pump, the coupling of system phonons to a thermal bath, and the Holstein interaction that couples electrons and phonons. We attempt an approximation where the pump induced electronic excitations are modeled by a slowly time varying `electron temperature', $T_{\rm el}(t)$, indicative of a quasi-equilibrium electronic state. We solve the problem for different combinations of $T_{\rm el}$ and $T_{\rm bath}$, probing the order parameter dynamics, the static properties and excitations in the long time `quasi steady state', and establish a `phase diagram' in terms of bath temperature and electron temperature.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强光激发后电荷有序态的熔化和恢复动力学，通过将泵浦诱导的电子激发建模为缓变的电子温度，系统探究了不同电子温度和热浴温度组合下的有序参数行为，并建立了准稳态相图。
AI.motivation: 泵浦-探测实验揭示了电荷有序态在强光激发后的熔化与恢复动力学，但现有基于电子-声子耦合的平衡态理论无法解释这一非平衡过程，因此需要建立新的理论框架来理解系统在光激发后的演化行为。
AI.method: 提出一个计算方案，同时纳入电子-激光泵浦耦合、系统声子与热浴耦合以及Holstein电子-声子相互作用。将泵浦诱导的电子激发近似为缓变的电子温度Tel(t)，模拟准平衡电子态，在不同Tel和Tbath组合下求解问题。
AI.result: 得到了不同电子温度和热浴温度组合下的有序参数动力学、静态性质以及长时间准稳态下的激发特性，建立了以热浴温度和电子温度为参数的相图。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解非平衡条件下电荷有序态的光致熔化与恢复过程提供了理论框架，揭示了热浴（开放系统）在能量耗散和涨落过程中的关键作用，为泵浦-探测实验现象提供了新的理解途径。

title: Gate-Controlled Spin Qubits in Confined Altermagnets
summary: We propose gate-defined spin qubits in electrostatically confined altermagnetic quantum dots. Elliptical confinement of the $d$-wave altermagnetic structure produces a low-energy doublet with opposite spin polarization. For the range of parameters used here, the qubit states energy gap lies in the microwave range while the leakage gap remains in the meV range. Even without spin-orbit coupling, time-dependent simulations show that a phase-controlled quadrupolar gate drive about a fixed bias point implements $X_{π/2}$ and $X_π$ rotations by resonantly modulating the confinement anisotropy. We extend the study to two-qubits using a double quantum dot. We show that the double quantum dot spectrum can be cleanly projected onto isolated quantum dot product states with a nonzero nonlocal Pauli block in the effective logical two-qubit Hamiltonian. Resonant central-barrier modulation then drives the logical two-qubit component close to a maximally entangled state. These calculations show anisotropic altermagnetic quantum dots as a route to locally gate-controlled spin qubits without requiring spin-orbit coupling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于交变磁体量子点的门控自旋量子比特方案，利用椭圆限制产生低能自旋极化二重态，通过四级门驱动实现单比特旋转，并在双量子点中实现了两量子比特纠缠，全程无需自旋-轨道耦合。
AI.motivation: 现有自旋量子比特通常依赖自旋-轨道耦合或磁场梯度来实现门控操作，增加了器件复杂性和退相干风险。本文旨在探索一种无需自旋-轨道耦合的新型自旋量子比特实现路径。
AI.method: 采用静电限制构建d波交变磁体量子点，通过椭圆各向异性约束产生低能自旋极化二重态；利用相位控制的四级门驱动共振调制限制各向异性，实现X_{π/2}和X_π旋转；在双量子点中通过中心势垒调制驱动两量子比特纠缠。
AI.result: 单比特能隙在微波范围，泄漏能隙在meV范围；无需自旋-轨道耦合即可实现单比特门操作；双量子点谱可干净投影到孤立量子点乘积态上，非局域Pauli阻塞非零；共振势垒调制可将两量子比特驱向最大纠缠态。
AI.conclusion: 各向异性交变磁体量子点为实现局部门控自旋量子比特提供了一条无需自旋-轨道耦合的新途径，具有潜在的扩展性和低退相干优势。

title: Nonradiative Multiphonon Model of Deep-Level Transient Spectroscopy: Beyond Henry-Lang Model
summary: Deep-level transient spectroscopy (DLTS) is a key experimental method for defect characterization, yet its analysis remains controversial, and the two widely used models developed by Henry and Lang are conflicting. We show that the Henry-Lang model is valid only under the Condon approximation, as well as high-temperature and strong electron-phonon coupling approximations, which cause incorrect temperature dependence of carrier emission and capture. Here we develop a rigorous nonradiative multiphonon (NMP) model, and demonstrate that the temperature dependence is governed predominantly by effective phonons with large phonon wavefunction overlap and high thermal occupation. The effective phonons are strongly correlated with lattice relaxation.The neglect of this correlation in existing DLTS models introduces substantial errors when they are used to fit DLTS-measured emission rates. Our comparison for 21 different defects in 12 semiconductors, including Si, SiC and Ga$_2$O$_3$, shows that the Henry-Lang model gives a completely different temperature dependence of carrier capture cross section from that obtained using the rigorous NMP model, with errors reaching up to six orders of magnitude at room temperature. Our study highlights the necessity of revisiting previous DLTS analysis studies using the rigorous NMP model.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了传统深能级瞬态谱（DLTS）分析中Henry-Lang模型的根本缺陷，提出了严格的无辐射多声子（NMP）模型，并通过21种缺陷在12种半导体中的对比，证明传统模型在室温下对载流子俘获截面的误差高达六个数量级。
AI.motivation: DLTS是缺陷表征的关键实验方法，但其分析模型（Henry-Lang模型）存在争议且与另一模型矛盾，导致对载流子发射和俘获的温度依赖性描述不准确，亟需建立更严格的物理模型来纠正系统误差。
AI.method: 发展了一个严格的无辐射多声子（NMP）模型，引入有效声子概念（具有大声子波函数重叠和高热占据），考虑声子与晶格弛豫的强关联性，并在12种半导体（Si、SiC、Ga₂O₃等）的21种缺陷上对比传统模型。
AI.result: Henry-Lang模型仅在Condon近似、高温和强电子-声子耦合近似下成立，其给出的载流子俘获截面温度依赖性与严格NMP模型完全不同，室温下误差高达六个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 现有的DLTS分析结果需要基于严格NMP模型重新审视，传统模型因忽略有效声子与晶格弛豫的关联而引入巨大误差。

title: First-Order Recoverability Collapse in Self-Referential Information Decoders
comment: 19 pages, 4 figures. Part of the Recoverable Self-Coding program (Entropy 2026, Barcelona)
summary: We study adaptive systems coupling inference to irreversible action under sustained nonequilibrium driving. Treating information processing as a thermodynamic load, we model them as finite-capacity decoders whose irreversible commitments eliminate counterfactual options, and characterize recoverable operation by a feasibility margin and a stability diagnostic fixing when irreversible action is admissible. Under sustained overload -- induced flux exceeding effective integrative capacity -- loss of recoverability and divergence of the diagnostic arise as structural consequences of capacity saturation, independent of optimization objective, control policy, or substrate. Added capacity alone does not restore recoverability: absent certification or gating, higher throughput accelerates non-recoverable loss, with high-throughput AI a concrete application. Making the feedback explicit -- each uncertified commitment spawning on average alpha new candidates -- turns the continuous transition first-order: lucid and collapsed states coexist in a cusp-organized bistable region with closed-form spinodals, collapse pre-empts the continuous divergence at finite stability ratio, recovery is hysteretic, and for alpha >= 1 load reduction alone cannot restore operation. Cascade sizes are bounded by the grounded fraction of input: a genealogy-times-congestion factorization sets a cutoff that grows as grounding shrinks, with the mean-field exponent tau = 3/2 recovered away from the boundary and each cascade carrying a Landauer-priced burst of synthetic entropy; event-driven simulations confirm the cutoff law and phase structure. This supplies the statistical mechanics of the metastable failures seen in distributed systems. The analysis is constraint-based and substrate-agnostic, establishing recoverable dissipation as a necessary criterion for decoder stability in high-flux regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个约束驱动的热力学框架，研究非平衡驱动下自适应系统（如AI）中不可逆行动与信息处理的耦合。通过有限容量解码器模型，发现当诱导通量超过集成容量时，系统必然失去可恢复性，且容量增加反而加速不可恢复损失。引入反馈后，连续相变变为一级相变，出现滞后和双稳态区域。级联规模受接地分数约束，遵循平均场指数tau=3/2，每次级联携带Landauer priced的合成熵。该分析确立“可恢复耗散”是高通量解码器稳定性的必要判据。
AI.motivation: 动机在于理解非平衡驱动下，将信息处理作为热力学负载的自适应系统中，不可逆行动与有限容量推理之间的基本约束关系，尤其是系统在持续过载下丧失可恢复性的机制。
AI.method: 采用约束驱动、与基底无关的分析方法，将自适应系统建模为有限容量解码器，引入可恢复性裕度和稳定性诊断指标，并通过明确反馈机制（每个未认证承诺平均产生alpha个新候选）将连续相变扩展为一级相变，辅以事件驱动模拟验证。
AI.result: (1) 通量超过容量时，可恢复性丧失和诊断发散是结构必然结果；(2) 单纯增加容量无法恢复可恢复性，反而加速损失；(3) 反馈使过渡变为一级相变，出现明/塌缩态共存的双稳区域和滞后；(4) 级联规模受接地分数约束，远离边界时恢复平均场指数tau=3/2；(5) 每次级联产生Landauer priced的合成熵。
AI.conclusion: 可恢复性耗散是高通量解码器稳定性的必要条件。该分析为分布式系统中观察到的亚稳态故障提供了统计力学基础，强调认证或门控机制不可或缺。

title: Introduction to matrix-product states and tensor networks
summary: These notes provide an introduction to tensor-network methods in quantum many-body physics, with an emphasis on matrix-product states (MPS). They develop the basic tensor-network language, including graphical notation, virtual indices, bond dimensions, gauge freedom, canonical forms, QR and singular-value decompositions, and the role of entanglement in controlling the efficiency of the representation. The main MPS algorithms are then introduced, including contractions, correlation functions, matrix-product operators, DMRG, and time-evolution methods. The notes also briefly discuss projected entangled-pair states (PEPS) as a higher-dimensional generalization of MPS, together with the basic ideas behind approximate PEPS contraction. Finally, tensor-network representations of mixed states, quantum channels, and Lindblad dynamics are presented, with applications to thermal states and open quantum systems. The presentation is accompanied by short Julia code examples based on ITensor, ITensorMPS, and TensorMixedStates. These notes were written for the 9th Les Houches Summer School on Computational Physics: Open Quantum Systems, held in June 2026.

AI.tldr: 本文全面介绍了量子多体物理中的张量网络方法，重点讲解矩阵乘积态（MPS）的核心概念、算法实现及其在开放量子系统中的应用，并提供了基于Julia的代码示例。
AI.motivation: 为量子多体物理和开放量子系统领域的研究者提供一套系统、易懂的张量网络方法入门教程，降低MPS及相关算法的学习门槛。
AI.method: 以图文结合方式讲解张量网络基本语言（图形符号、虚拟指标、键维、规范自由度、QR分解、奇异值分解等），进而介绍MPS核心算法（收缩、关联函数、矩阵乘积算子、DMRG、时间演化），并扩展到PEPS、混合态、量子信道及Lindblad动力学，辅以Julia/ITensor代码示例。
AI.result: 构建了一个从基础理论到前沿应用的完整张量网络教学体系，覆盖了MPS、PEPS及开放量子系统的张量网络表示。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络方法是研究量子多体系统和开放量子动力学的强大工具，MPS在低维系统中尤为高效，而PEPS等推广为高维系统提供了可能。该教程有望成为该领域的标准入门教材。

title: Band offsets and stability of WSe$_2$/RuCl$_3$ van der Waals charge-transfer contacts
summary: The layered Mott insulator $α$-RuCl$_3$ induces degenerate hole-doping in two-dimensional semiconductors due to its large electron affinity, making it a promising charge-transfer material for establishing ohmic contacts in electronic devices. In order to assess the applicability and guide the design of devices incorporating RuCl$_3$ it is critical to determine the electronic structure and robustness of the band offsets that underpin the transport properties of semiconductors in contact with RuCl$_3$. Here, we apply micro-focused angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy to determine the electronic structure of single-layer WSe$_2$ contacted to RuCl$_3$ on hexagonal boron nitride substrates. We find that formation of a functioning WSe$_2$/RuCl$_3$ contact leads to a valence band shift of $(0.68 \pm 0.05)$ eV towards the Fermi energy in WSe$_2$. The charge transfer effect is challenging to observe as it depends sensitively on fabrication conditions such as solvent exposure, quality of interface encapsulation and heating of RuCl$_3$, imposing strict requirements on device design to attain high-quality contacts.

AI.tldr: 本文通过微聚焦角分辨光电子能谱研究了单层WSe₂与RuCl₃接触后的电子结构，发现价带向费米能级移动了0.68 eV，但该电荷转移效应高度依赖于制备条件。
AI.motivation: RuCl₃因其大电子亲和势可使二维半导体简并掺杂，有望用于欧姆接触，但需评估其能带偏移的稳定性以指导器件设计。
AI.method: 使用微聚焦角分辨光电子能谱（micro-ARPES）测量与RuCl₃接触的单层WSe₂（置于hBN基底上）的电子结构。
AI.result: 功能良好的WSe₂/RuCl₃接触使WSe₂的价带向费米能级偏移(0.68±0.05) eV；该电荷转移效应敏感依赖于溶剂暴露、界面封装质量和RuCl₃加热等制备条件。
AI.conclusion: RuCl₃与WSe₂接触可实现有效的电荷转移，但为实现高质量接触需严格控制器件制备工艺。

title: One-dimensional self-organization of water molecules in proton conducting Andersson-Wadsley titanates
summary: Layered alkali titanates with M 2 Ti 2 O 5 chemical formula (MTO, M=K,Rb) belonging to the Andersson-Wadsley perovskite family spontaneously incorporate water to form MTO.(H 2 O) x compounds, which exhibit superionic conductivity. At very low hydration x, scanning electron microscopy evidences one-dimensional heterogeneous patterns oriented along ___ b that are arranged in an orderly manner. At higher hydration, the material is observed to spontaneously exfoliate by creating (001) surfaces. Simulations carried out using Density Functional Theory reveal an ordered arrangement of the guest water molecules in Rb 2 Ti 2 O 5 , with strong hydrogen bonds between the water molecules and the apical oxygen of the host crystal. At low hydration x, the water molecules form self-organized one dimensional (1D) double chains along ___ b. Further increase of the water content leads to the creation of hydrated (001)-surfaces that are made of densely packed water chains in agreement with the infrared spectroscopy measurements. Rb 2 Ti 2 O 5 exhibits highly anisotropic proton conductivity, with respect to the crystal orientation, with super-ionic conductivity along ___ b reaching 3 mS/cm at room temperature after hydration. The combined observations and simulations suggest that these water chains are thus at the root of fast proton conduction, which is likely powered by a Grotthuss-like mechanism.

AI.tldr: 层状碱金属钛酸盐M₂Ti₂O₅（M=K,Rb）自发吸水形成超离子导体。低水合度时水分子沿b轴自组织形成一维双链，高水合度时发生剥离形成(001)水链表面。Rb₂Ti₂O₅沿b轴室温质子电导率达3 mS/cm，源于Grotthuss机制驱动的链式质子传导。
AI.motivation: 探究层状碱金属钛酸盐M₂Ti₂O₅（Andersson-Wadsley钙钛矿家族）中水分子嵌入引起的超离子导电现象，揭示水分子排列方式与质子传导机制之间的关系。
AI.method: 采用扫描电子显微镜（SEM）观测不同水合度下的微观形貌，结合密度泛函理论（DFT）模拟水分子排列，并利用红外光谱测量验证；通过取向依赖的质子电导率测试评估各向异性。
AI.result: 低水合度下水分子沿b轴自组装成一维双链，高水合度下形成(001)表面水链；Rb₂Ti₂O₅沿b轴室温质子电导率达3 mS/cm，呈高度各向异性。
AI.conclusion: 水分子自组织形成的一维水链是快速质子传导的结构基础，传导机制为Grotthuss型质子跳跃。

title: Polyatomic Thermal Radiative Dissociation in Microcavities
summary: Blackbody infrared radiative dissociation (BIRD) activates molecules through successive absorption of ambient thermal photons until the internal energy reaches a dissociation threshold. Because these radiative transition rates depend on the electromagnetic density of states (DOS), structured infrared environments provide a route to control thermal unimolecular dissociation. Here we develop a state-resolved master-equation framework for polyatomic BIRD in a planar Au/MgO multilayer cavity, where the reactive cluster $\mathrm{(H_2O)_2Cl^-}$ is studied. The cavity modifies the kinetics through the DOS sampled by anharmonic fundamental, overtone, and combination transitions. We show that MgO surface phonon polaritons produce strong near-field enhancements in the central vacuum reaction region of a microcavity. We find that short cavities with thick polar crystal layers yield the largest BIRD enhancements due to enhanced evanescent surface phonon polariton contributions. We further include collisions with a methane bath gas and show that cavity DOS engineering shifts the crossover between BIRD and collisional activation. These results establish Reststrahlen-band DOS engineering as a practical strategy for controlling polyatomic BIRD in infrared microcavities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过状态分辨主方程框架，研究了在平面Au/MgO多层微腔中，(H₂O)₂Cl⁻团簇的黑体红外辐射解离（BIRD）动力学，发现腔体通过电磁态密度（DOS）调控非谐基频、泛频和组合跃迁，MgO表面声子极化激元产生的近场增强效应可显著加速BIRD，短腔和厚极化晶体层效果最佳，且腔体DOS工程能改变BIRD与碰撞活化的交叉点。
AI.motivation: 探索通过结构化红外环境（如微腔）中的电磁态密度调控来控制多原子分子的热单分子解离（BIRD）动力学。
AI.method: 建立了状态分辨的主方程框架，在平面Au/MgO多层微腔中模拟(H₂O)₂Cl⁻团簇的BIRD过程，考虑了非谐基频、泛频和组合跃迁的DOS效应，并引入甲烷碰撞气体进行对比。
